description_long: This is a classic chef's knife featuring a broad, slightly curved stainless steel blade with a sharp, pointed tip, ideal for slicing, dicing, and chopping. The blade is polished to a smooth, reflective finish and is single-edged, tapering to a fine point. The handle is ergonomically contoured, made of black composite material, and secured with three visible rivets for durability and comfort. The handle has a subtle curve and a slight flare at the end, providing a secure grip. There is no visible guard between the blade and handle, but the bolster is slightly thickened for balance and safety. The overall design is utilitarian and professional, with no decorative ornamentation.
description: A professional chef's knife with a broad, polished stainless steel blade and a contoured black handle secured by rivets. The design is sleek, functional, and unadorned.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the blade and handle, with all three rivets visible on the handle.
description_view_1: Edge-on view displaying the thinness of the blade and the narrow profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with the blade and handle shape clearly visible.
description_view_3: Edge-on view from the opposite side, again highlighting the slimness of the blade and handle.
attribute_blade_type: straight, single-edged, broad chef's knife blade
attribute_handle_design: contoured black plastic handle with three rivets, ergonomic shape
